2401350.name: Timeless Rain
2401350.description:
Play the demo now which features infinite lives for the 'Casual' difficulty setting to help introduce you to the world of Timeless Rain! Please note that this is an exclusive feature for the demo only.

In Timeless Rain you awake within an unknown world which seems to be unbound by the limitations of time. There are whispers of a place, deep within these lands, which is said to give you the power to manipulate time and make you a god. Be careful though, not everyone is on your side...

During the course of your travels through this world, there is some important information you may want to know. As any other traveler who grasps onto their instinct to survive within this hellscape naturally would, you will learn to manipulate time in slight manners. The process will be slow and tedious, but surviving long enough to reach this 'place' is surely going to be worth it... right? Because if not... why not just feed yourself to the devils and demons that inhabit this realm?

In this 2D Metroidvania, you'll progress through the variety of environments by manipulating time in a variety of ways such as bringing time to a halt and being able to restore lost pathways. However, this won't be your only method of maneuvering through obstacles as you'll also need to make use of your abilities to double jump and dash. You'll have to be prepared to go up against challenging bosses which will each force you to prove your skills at playing with time.

This game contains:

  • A intriguing story which has multiple endings!

  • A beautiful hand-drawn world for you to explore!

  • Characters spread throughout this realm for you to interact with!

  • Challenging boss fights to really test your skill!

  • A brilliant original score to accompany your travels!

Please keep in mind that this game was developed by one person so, while it is small, you should find that it is also very sweet!

I hope you enjoy Timeless Rain when it releases on March 31st!

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
